item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-12)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 44522 Trending skills: 18415 Hot skills: 3406 Top All Time: find-skills (503582) Top Trending: simple (19150) Top Hot: skill-creator (192)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): pdf
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 79 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): self-improving-agent
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 58 Source: charon-fan/agent-playbook Description: A universal self-improving agent that learns from ALL skill experiences. Uses multi-memory architecture (semantic + episodic + working) to continuously evolve the codebase. Auto-triggers on skill completion/error with hooks-based self-correction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): summarize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 35 Source: steipete/clawdis Description: Summarize or extract text/transcripts from URLs, podcasts, and local files (great fallback for “transcribe this YouTube/video”).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 189 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): using-superpowers
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 63 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): china-stock-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 30 Source: sugarforever/01coder-agent-skills Description: A股价值投资分析工具，提供股票筛选、个股深度分析、行业对比和估值计算功能。基于价值投资理论，使用akshare获取公开财务数据，适合低频交易的普通投资者。

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): search
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 57 Source: tavily-ai/skills Description: Search the web using Tavily's LLM-optimized search API. Returns relevant results with content snippets, scores, and metadata. Use when you need to find web content on any topic without writing code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): next-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 47 Source: vercel-labs/next-skills Description: Next.js best practices - file conventions, RSC boundaries, data patterns, async APIs, metadata, error handling, route handlers, image/font optimization, bundling

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): tailwind-design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 29 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Build scalable design systems with Tailwind CSS, design tokens, component libraries, and responsive patterns. Use when creating component libraries, implementing design systems, or standardizing UI patterns.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): azure-ai
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 84 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Use for Azure AI: Search, Speech, OpenAI, Document Intelligence. Helps with search, vector/hybrid search, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, transcription, OCR. USE FOR: AI Search, query search, vector search, hybrid search, semantic search, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, transcribe, OCR, convert text to speech. DO NOT USE FOR: Function apps/Functions (use azure-functions), databases (azure-postgres/azure-kusto), general Azure resources.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): azure-kusto
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 83 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Query and analyze data in Azure Data Explorer (Kusto/ADX) using KQL for log analytics, telemetry, and time series analysis. USE FOR: KQL queries, Kusto database queries, Azure Data Explorer, ADX clusters, log analytics, time series data, IoT telemetry, anomaly detection DO NOT USE FOR: SQL databases (use azure-postgres), NoSQL queries (use azure-storage), Elasticsearch, AWS analytics tools

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): python-performance-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 14 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Profile and optimize Python code using cProfile, memory profilers, and performance best practices. Use when debugging slow Python code, optimizing bottlenecks, or improving application performance.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): memory-merger
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 13 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Merges mature lessons from a domain memory file into its instruction file. Syntax: `/memory-merger >domain [scope]` where scope is `global` (default), `user`, `workspace`, or `ws`.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): clerk-nextjs-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 13 Source: clerk/skills Description: Advanced Next.js patterns - middleware, Server Actions, caching with Clerk.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): appinsights-instrumentation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Guidance for instrumenting webapps with Azure Application Insights. Provides telemetry patterns, SDK setup, and configuration references. USE FOR: how to instrument app, App Insights SDK, telemetry patterns, what is App Insights, Application Insights guidance, instrumentation examples, APM best practices. DO NOT USE FOR: adding App Insights to my app (use azure-prepare), add telemetry to my project (use azure-prepare), add monitoring (use azure-prepare). This skill provides guidance—azure-prepare orchestrates component changes.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): azure-rbac
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Helps users find the right Azure RBAC role for an identity with least privilege access, then generate CLI commands and Bicep code to assign it. USE FOR: "what role should I assign", "least privilege role", "RBAC role for", "role to read blobs", "role for managed identity", "custom role definition", "assign role to identity". DO NOT USE FOR: creating or configuring managed identities, or general Azure security hardening; those are out of scope for this role-selection skill.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): azure-prepare
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Default entry point for Azure application development. Invoke this skill for ANY application work related to Azure: creating apps, building features, adding components, updating code, migrating, or modernizing. Analyzes your project and prepares it for Azure deployment by generating infrastructure code (Bicep/Terraform), azure.yaml configuration, and Dockerfiles. USE FOR: create an app, build a web app, create API, create frontend, create backend, add a feature, build a service, make an application, develop a project, migrate my app, modernize my code, update my application, add database, add authentication, add caching, deploy to Azure, host on Azure, Azure with Terraform (defaults to azd+Terraform), Azure with azd, generate azure.yaml, generate Bicep or Terraform, prepare Azure Functions. DO NOT USE FOR: only validating an already-prepared app (use azure-validate), only running azd up/deploy (use azure-deploy), pure Terraform without azd (prefer azd+Terraform).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): azure-resource-lookup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: List, find, and show Azure resources. Answers "list my VMs", "show my storage accounts", "list websites", "find container apps", "what resources do I have", and similar queries for any Azure resource type. USE FOR: list resources, list virtual machines, list VMs, list storage accounts, list websites, list web apps, list container apps, show resources, find resources, what resources do I have, list resources in resource group, list resources in subscription, find resources by tag, find orphaned resources, resource inventory, count resources by type, cross-subscription resource query, Azure Resource Graph, resource discovery, list container registries, list SQL servers, list Key Vaults, show resource groups, list app services, find resources across subscriptions, find unattached disks, tag analysis. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), creating or modifying resources, cost optimization (use azure-cost-optimization), writing application code, non-Azure clouds.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): azure-validate
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Pre-deployment validation checkpoint. Run deep checks to ensure your application is ready for Azure deployment. Validates configuration, infrastructure, permissions, and prerequisites. USE FOR: validate my app, check deployment readiness, run preflight checks, verify configuration, check if ready to deploy, validate azure.yaml, validate Bicep, test before deploying, troubleshoot deployment errors. DO NOT USE FOR: creating or building apps (use azure-prepare), executing deployments (use azure-deploy).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): entra-app-registration
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Guides Microsoft Entra ID app registration, OAuth 2.0 authentication, and MSAL integration. USE FOR: create app registration, register Azure AD app, configure OAuth, set up authentication, add API permissions, generate service principal, MSAL example, console app auth, Entra ID setup, Azure AD authentication. DO NOT USE FOR: Azure RBAC or role assignments (use azure-rbac), Key Vault secrets (use azure-keyvault-expiration-audit), Azure resource security (use azure-security).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): azure-aigateway
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Configure Azure API Management (APIM) as AI Gateway to secure, observe, control AI models, MCP servers, agents. Helps with rate limiting, semantic caching, content safety, load balancing. USE FOR: AI Gateway, APIM, setup gateway, configure gateway, add gateway, model gateway, MCP server, rate limit, token limit, semantic cache, content safety, load balance, OpenAPI import, convert API to MCP. DO NOT USE FOR: deploy models (use microsoft-foundry), Azure Functions (use azure-functions), databases (use azure-postgres).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): azure-resource-visualizer
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Analyze Azure resource groups and generate detailed Mermaid architecture diagrams showing the relationships between individual resources. USE FOR: create architecture diagram, visualize Azure resources, show resource relationships, generate Mermaid diagram, analyze resource group, diagram my resources, architecture visualization, resource topology, map Azure infrastructure DO NOT USE FOR: creating/modifying resources (use azure-deploy), security scanning (use azure-security), performance troubleshooting (use azure-diagnostics), code generation (use relevant service skill)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): azure-compliance
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Comprehensive Azure compliance and security auditing capabilities including best practices assessment, Key Vault expiration monitoring, and resource configuration validation. USE FOR: compliance scan, security audit, azqr, Azure best practices, Key Vault expiration check, compliance assessment, resource review, configuration validation, expired certificates, expiring secrets, orphaned resources, policy compliance, security posture evaluation. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), cost analysis alone (use azure-cost-optimization), active security hardening (use azure-security-hardening), general Azure Advisor queries (use azure-observability).

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): azure-diagnostics
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 82 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Debug and troubleshoot production issues on Azure. Covers Container Apps diagnostics, log analysis with KQL, health checks, and common issue resolution for image pulls, cold starts, and health probes. USE FOR: debug production issues, troubleshoot container apps, analyze logs with KQL, fix image pull failures, resolve cold start issues, investigate health probe failures, check resource health, view application logs, find root cause of errors DO NOT USE FOR: deploying applications (use azure-deploy), creating new resources (use azure-prepare), setting up monitoring (use azure-observability), cost optimization (use azure-cost-optimization)

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#11): nano-banana-2
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 10614 Source: inference-shell/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input (up to 14 images), Google Search grounding. Triggers: nano banana 2, nanobanana 2, gemini 3.1 flash image, gemini 3 1 flash image preview, google image generation

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#13): remotion-render
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 10470 Source: inference-shell/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#44): python-executor
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 1435 Source: inference-shell/skills Description: Execute Python code in a safe sandboxed environment via [inference.sh](https://inference.sh). Pre-installed: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, requests, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Playwright, MoviePy, Pillow, OpenCV, trimesh, and 100+ more libraries. Use for: data processing, web scraping, image manipulation, video creation, 3D model processing, PDF generation, API calls, automation scripts. Triggers: python, execute code, run script, web scraping, data analysis, image processing, video editing, 3D models, automation, pandas, matplotlib

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): web-search
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1400 Source: inference-shell/skills Description: Web search and content extraction with Tavily and Exa via inference.sh CLI. Apps: Tavily Search, Tavily Extract, Exa Search, Exa Answer, Exa Extract. Capabilities: AI-powered search, content extraction, direct answers, research. Use for: research, RAG pipelines, fact-checking, content aggregation, agents. Triggers: web search, tavily, exa, search api, content extraction, research, internet search, ai search, search assistant, web scraping, rag, perplexity alternative

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (1 → 3): find-skills
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #1 Current rank: #3 Delta: -2 Installs: 762 (prev 579) Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (14 → 29): remotion-best-practices
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #14 Current rank: #29 Delta: -15 Installs: 94 (prev 102) Source: remotion-dev/skills Description: Best practices for Remotion - Video creation in React

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (18 → 33): swiftui-pro
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #18 Current rank: #33 Delta: -15 Installs: 25 (prev 35) Source: twostraws/swiftui-agent-skill Description: Comprehensively reviews SwiftUI code for best practices on modern APIs, maintainability, and performance. Use when reading, writing, or reviewing SwiftUI projects.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (2 → 5): agent-browser
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #5 Delta: -3 Installs: 163 (prev 129) Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (20 → 1): skill-creator
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #20 Current rank: #1 Delta: +19 Installs: 192 (prev 78) Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (21 → 7): optimize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #21 Current rank: #7 Delta: +14 Installs: 67 (prev 27) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface performance across loading speed, rendering, animations, images, and bundle size. Makes experiences faster and smoother.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (22 → 4): animate
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #22 Current rank: #4 Delta: +18 Installs: 68 (prev 27) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Review a feature and enhance it with purposeful animations, micro-interactions, and motion effects that improve usability and delight.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (25 → 12): colorize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #25 Current rank: #12 Delta: +13 Installs: 66 (prev 27) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add strategic color to features that are too monochromatic or lack visual interest. Makes interfaces more engaging and expressive.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (27 → 6): normalize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #27 Current rank: #6 Delta: +21 Installs: 67 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Normalize design to match your design system and ensure consistency

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (28 → 17): harden
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #28 Current rank: #17 Delta: +11 Installs: 62 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface resilience through better error handling, i18n support, text overflow handling, and edge case management. Makes interfaces robust and production-ready.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (29 → 9): clarify
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #29 Current rank: #9 Delta: +20 Installs: 66 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve unclear UX copy, error messages, microcopy, labels, and instructions. Makes interfaces easier to understand and use.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (3 → 2): frontend-design
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #2 Delta: +1 Installs: 196 (prev 187) Source: anthropics/skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (32 → 11): polish
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #32 Current rank: #11 Delta: +21 Installs: 66 (prev 27) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Final quality pass before shipping. Fixes alignment, spacing, consistency, and detail issues that separate good from great.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (33 → 8): audit
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #8 Delta: +25 Installs: 66 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Perform comprehensive audit of interface quality across accessibility, performance, theming, and responsive design. Generates detailed report of issues with severity ratings and recommendations.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (34 → 15): critique
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #34 Current rank: #15 Delta: +19 Installs: 63 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Evaluate design effectiveness from a UX perspective. Assesses visual hierarchy, information architecture, emotional resonance, and overall design quality with actionable feedback.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (35 → 13): bolder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #35 Current rank: #13 Delta: +22 Installs: 64 (prev 25) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Amplify safe or boring designs to make them more visually interesting and stimulating. Increases impact while maintaining usability.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (36 → 19): distill
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #36 Current rank: #19 Delta: +17 Installs: 61 (prev 25) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Strip designs to their essence by removing unnecessary complexity. Great design is simple, powerful, and clean.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 16): adapt
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #16 Delta: +26 Installs: 64 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Adapt designs to work across different screen sizes, devices, contexts, or platforms. Ensures consistent experience across varied environments.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (43 → 10): frontend-design
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #43 Current rank: #10 Delta: +33 Installs: 65 (prev 26) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (45 → 20): onboard
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #45 Current rank: #20 Delta: +25 Installs: 61 (prev 25) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Design or improve onboarding flows, empty states, and first-time user experiences. Helps users get started successfully and understand value quickly.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (46 → 21): teach-impeccable
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #46 Current rank: #21 Delta: +25 Installs: 61 (prev 25) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: One-time setup that gathers design context for your project and saves it to your AI config file. Run once to establish persistent design guidelines.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (47 → 14): quieter
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #47 Current rank: #14 Delta: +33 Installs: 63 (prev 24) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Tone down overly bold or visually aggressive designs. Reduces intensity while maintaining design quality and impact.
